titlestmt.titleproper: Paul Mellon collection of British artists' correspondence
Mellon (Paul) collection of British artists' correspondence
titlestmt.author: edited by Francis Lapka

publicationstmt.publisher: Yale Center for British Art, Rare Books and Manuscripts

address.addressline: Department of Rare Books and Manuscripts

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

Boxes: Farquharson-1, Barlow 1, Barry 1, Bayliss 1, Beazley 1, Bramley 1, Brett 1, Brockwell 1, Burnet 1, Calderon 1, Callcott 1, Chalon 1, Clint 1, Cockerell 1, Cooke 1, Cooper 1, Cox 1, Cruikshank 1, Daniell 1, Davis 1, Dicksee 1, Doo 1, Drummond 1, Dyce 1, Eastlake 1, Elmore 1, Fell 1, Fielding 1, Fripp 1, Frost 1, Gandy 1, Given 1, Godwin 1, Goodall 1, Grant 1, Gregory 1, Hacker 1, Haden 1, Hale 1, Hammersley 1, Hardwick 1, Hart 1, Hayter 1, Haywood 1, Herbert 1, Hering 1, Hilton 1, Hodgson 1, Hook 1, Horsley 1, Howard 1, Hullmandel 1, Hunt 1, Hunter 1, Ibbetson 1, Inskipp 1, Jones 1, Knight 1, Landseer 1, Lane 1, Leader 1, Leighton 1, LeKeux 1, Linnell 1, Long 1, Lucas 1, Lutyens 1, Marshall 1, McKewan 1, Moon 1, Moore 1, Morris 1, Mutrie 1, Nettleship 1, Newton 1, Niemann 1, O'Neil 1, O'Neill 1, Oakes 1, Orchardson 1, Orrock 1, Palmer 1, Parsons 1, Patten 1, Penley 1, Phillip 1, Phillips 1, Pickersgill 1, Poole 1, Pye 1, Read 1, Redgrave 1, Richardson 1, Riou 1, Roberts 1, Robinson 1, Roe 1, Rosenberg 1, Ross 1, Ruskin 1, Salvin 1, Sant 1, Say 1, Scoles 1, Scott 1, Simpson 1, Smythe 1, Stevens 1, Stone 1, Street 1, Thomas 1, Thorburn 1, Topham 1, Uwins 1, Ward 1, Warren 1, Waterhouse 1, Waterlow 1, Watson 1, Webster 1, Weekes 1, Weigall 1, Wells 1, Westmacott 1, Wilson 1, Wright 1, Wyatt 1-2, Barry 2, Bramley 2, Brockwell 2, Cockerell 2, Cox 2, Davis 2, Dicksee 2, Frost 2, Godwin 2, Goodall 2, Hacker 2, Hammersley 2, Hardwick 2, Hart 2, Hodgson 2, Horsley 2, Hullmandel 2, Hunter 2, Landseer 2, Leader 2, Linnell 2, Long 2, Moon 2, Moore 2, Morris 2, Nettleship 2, Niemann 2, Penley 2, Pickersgill 2, Poole 2, Read 2, Richardson 2, Roberts 2, Ruskin 2, Scoles 2, Simpson 2, Stone 2, Ward 2, Warren 2, Wells 2, Westmacott 2-Aumonier 3, Barry 3, Davis 3, Dicksee 3, Goodall 3, Hart 3, Horsley 3, Landseer 3, Leader 3, Linnell 3, Long 3, Morris 3, Nettleship 3, Pickersgill 3, Roberts 3, Ruskin 3, Ward 3, Wells 3-Aumonier 4, Davis 4, Dicksee 4, Goodall 4, Horsley 4, Leader 4, Linnell 4, Long 4, Morris 4, Nettleship 4, Pickersgill 4, Roberts 4-Aumonier 5, Dicksee 5, Goodall 5, Leader 5, Morris 5, Pickersgill 5, Roberts 5-Aumonier 6, Dicksee 6, Goodall 6, Morris 6, Pickersgill 6, Roberts 6-Aumonier 7, Goodall 7, Roberts 7-Goodall 8, Roberts 8-Roberts 12

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Yale Center for British Art, Rare Books and Manuscripts

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday May 31, 2022 at 21:06

did.unittitle: Paul Mellon collection of British artists' correspondence

corpname.part: Yale Center for British Art, Rare Books and Manuscripts

did.physdesc: 2 boxes
did.abstract: The collection comprises correspondence by British artists, collected by Paul Mellon.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The collection is the physical property of the Yale Center for British Art. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the Curator of Rare Books and Manuscripts.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Paul Mellon collection of British artists' correspondence. Yale Center for British Art, Paul Mellon Collection.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Yale Center for British Art, Paul Mellon Collection

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection comprises correspondence by British artists, collected by Paul Mellon. Correspondents represented by multiple items within the collection include James Aumonier, Sir Charles Barry, Henry Sanford Bicknell, Frank Bramley, Charles Robert Cockerell, David Cox, Henry William Banks Davis, Francis Bernard Dicksee, William Hepworth Dixon, William Edward Frost, George Godwin, Frederick Goodall, Arthur Hacker, James Astbury Hammersley, Philip Hardwick, Solomon Alexander Hart, John Evan Hodgson, John Callcott Horsely, Charles Joseph Hullmandel, Colin Hunter, Charles Landseer, Benjamin William Leader, John Linnell, Edwin Longsden Long, William Mark, Francis Graham Moon, Albert Joseph Moore, Philip Richard Morris, John Trivett Nettleship, Edmund John Niemann, Aaron Edwin Penley, Frederick Richard Pickersgill, Henry William Pickersgill, Paul Falconer Poole, Harry Quilter, Samuel Read, Richard Redgrave, Samuel Redgrave, Thomas Miles Richardson, David Roberts, John Ruskin, Joseph John Scoles, John Simpson, Frank Stone, James Ward, Henry Warren, and Henry Tanworth Wells.

did.unittitle: George Gammon Adams letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: N. Adlerstein letter to Madame La Baronne
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Written in French.

did.unittitle: Thomas Allom letter to Mr. Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: James Archer letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Edward Armitage letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning a sketch sent to the Grosvenor Gallery at Sir Carter's invitation.

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Including acknowledgement of the notice in The universal review .

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: James Aumonier letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Thomas Oldham Barlow letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 5 pages (2 leaves) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 10 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning the Phillip's Memorial.

did.unittitle: Sir Charles Barry letter to "Sir"
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 13 x 10 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning designs of the sculptured crowns of Edward II and Edward III at the new House of Parliament.

did.unittitle: Sir Charles Barry letter to James Ward
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Sir Charles Barry letter to James Ward
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning John Gibson's statue of Queen Victoria.

did.unittitle: Sir Wyke Bayliss letter to George Wallis
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 21 x 13 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes prospectuses for The higher life in art and The witness of art .

did.unittitle: Samuel Beazley letter to Wainwright
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Salutation reads "Dear Sir".

did.unittitle: Sir William Boxall letter to Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 14 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: Frank Bramley letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Bramley's painting After Fifty Years .

did.unittitle: Frank Bramley letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: John Brett letter to "My Dear Sir"
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 21 x 13 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Brett asks for a professional opinion on two of his paintings rejected by the Academy.

did.unittitle: Maurice W. Brockwell letter to the Editor of the Morning Post
did.physdesc: 9 pages (9 leaves) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: James Greig letter to Maurice W. Brockwell
did.physdesc: 4 pages (2 leaves) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: John Burnet letter to Samuel Carter Hall
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Phillip Hermogenes Calderon letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Calderon's resignation from the etching club.

did.unittitle: Augustus Wall Callcott letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Alfred Edward Chalon letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 3 pages (2 leaves) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: George Clint letter to "My Dear Louisa"
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 10 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning the Art Union.

did.unittitle: Charles Robert Cockerell letter to "My Dear Sir"
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Charles Robert Cockerell letter to Sherratt & Hughes
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 13 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning the Kelmscott Press.

did.unittitle: Edward William Cooke letter to Richard (?) Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: Abraham Cooper letter to "My Dear Sir"
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: David Cox letter to Henry Cole
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Postmarked Jan 1842. Including extracts of Coleridge's lectures on Gothic Art furnished by Green.

did.unittitle: David Cox letter to William Roberts
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning a sketching trip through North Wales with Harry J. Johnson.

did.unittitle: George Cruikshank letter of introduction for Edward B. Dawson
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

did.unittitle: William Daniell letter to the Chairman and Directors of the Honorable the East India Company
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Testimonial on behalf of Richard Redgrave's qualifications to fill the position of Drawing Master at Addiscombe.

did.unittitle: Henry William Banks Davis letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Henry William Banks Davis letter to Harry Quilter (?)
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Henry William Banks Davis letter to Harry Quilter (?)
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Henry William Banks Davis letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Francis Bernard Dicksee letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Francis Bernard Dicksee letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: Francis Bernard Dicksee letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Francis Bernard Dicksee letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Dicksee's illustration of The Passing of Arthur (painted in 1889) for The Universal Review.

did.unittitle: Francis Bernard Dicksee letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning the Artist's War Fund Exhibition proposal.

did.unittitle: Francis Bernard Dicksee receipt to Joseph (?) Hogarth
did.physdesc:
1 page (1 leaf)
; 9 x 19 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: For receipt of payment for the painting Touchstone.

did.unittitle: George Thomas Doo letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Samuel Drummond letter to Henry Bicknell
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: William Dyce letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Sir Charles Lock Eastlake letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Penry Williams' paintings for loan at the International Exhibition.

did.unittitle: Alfred Elmore letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: Joseph Farquharson letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Herbert Granville Fell letter to Stanley Hazell
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 26 x 21 cm.

did.unittitle: Copley Fielding letter to Mrs. Daley
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: George Arthur Fripp letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Fripp's daughter attending the School of Design.

did.unittitle: William Edward Frost letter to the National Shakespeare Committee (?)
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning items to be sent to the National Shakespeare Committee.

did.unittitle: William Edward Frost letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Joseph Michael Gandy letter to Abraham Cooper
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

did.unittitle: William Given letter to "My Dear Sir"
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

did.unittitle: George Godwin letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Godwin's participation in the committee for the Shakespeare celebration movement.

did.unittitle: George Godwin letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Mr. Richardson-Gardner's donation of a statue of Shakespeare.

did.unittitle: Alice Goodall letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Frederick Goodall's painting The Old Kiln.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 10 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Quilter's notice of Goodall's painting Harrow on the Hill in The Universal Review.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Goodall's painting Eton from Windsor Castle.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Quilter's candidacy for the Slade Professorship.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to an unidentified recipient
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Frederick Goodall letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Salutation reads "My Dear Sir". Concerning Goodall's acceptance as a candidate to the Academy.

did.unittitle: Sir Francis Grant letter to Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 14 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: Edward John Gregory letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Arthur Hacker letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Arthur Hacker letter to Mr. Wright
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 16 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning receipt of payment for Hacker's portrait of Alderman R.W. James.

did.unittitle: Francis Seymour Haden letter to Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: Harrison Hale letter to Rudolph Ackermann
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 25 x 20 cm

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerns Ackermann's The repository of arts, literature, fashions, etc.

did.unittitle: James Astbury Hammersley letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 21 x 13 cm.

did.unittitle: James Astbury Hammersley letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: Philip Hardwick letter to David Roberts
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Philip Hardwick letter to David Roberts
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 17 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Solomon Alexander Hart letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Solomon Alexander Hart letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning the Shakespeare commemoration committee.

did.unittitle: Solomon Alexander Hart letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The beginning of the letter is lacking. Mentions the death of David Roberts.

did.unittitle: Sir George Hayter letter to Samuel Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 12 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: William Haywood letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 13 cm.

did.unittitle: John Rogers Herbert letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

did.unittitle: George Hering letter to "My Dear Sir"
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 14 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: William Hilton letter to the Chairman and Directors of the East India Company
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 19 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Testimonial on behalf of Richard Redgrave's qualifications to fill the position of Drawing Master at Addiscombe.

did.unittitle: John Evan Hodgson letter to "Dear Sir"
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 14 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: John Evan Hodgson letter to Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: James Clarke Hook letter to Redgrave
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 13 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: John Callcott Horsley letter to Joseph (?) Hogarth
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 11 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: John Callcott Horsley letter to Henry Bicknell
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: John Callcott Horsley letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 13 cm.

did.unittitle: John Callcott Horsley letter to Redgrave
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 14 x 9 cm.

did.unittitle: Henry Howard letter to the Chairman and Directors the East India Company
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Testimonial on behalf of Richard Redgrave's qualifications to fill the position of Drawing Master at Addiscombe.

did.unittitle: Charles Joseph Hullmandel letter to Frederick N. Crouch
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning the process of printing from zinc. The letter is written on paper watermarked 1835.

did.unittitle: Charles Joseph Hullmandel letter to "My Dear Robert"
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 19 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The letter is written on paper watermarked 1835.

did.unittitle: Alfred Hunt letter to Sir John Gilbert
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Colin Hunter letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 15 x 10 cm.

did.unittitle: Colin Hunter letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Julius Ibbetson letter to Benjamin West
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 23 x 18 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning West's Death on a Pale Horse and Ibbetson's work in Masham.

did.unittitle: James Inskipp letter to Miss Carrie
did.physdesc: 4 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 12 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning William Morris' decoration of Miss Carrie's house.

did.unittitle: George Jones letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Mentions Paris Exhibition.

did.unittitle: John Prescott Knight letter to William Hepworth Dixon
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Charles Landseer letter to Henry Mogford
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning a picture by Landseer for the Dublin Exhibition.

did.unittitle: Charles Landseer letter to Mrs. Sant
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 11 x 9 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Watermarked 1870.

did.unittitle: Jessica Landseer letter to Miss Watkins
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 16 x 10 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Watermarked 1860.

did.unittitle: Richard James Lane letter to Richard Redgrave
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Benjamin Williams Leader letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Benjamin Williams Leader letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Benjamin Williams Leader letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

did.unittitle: Benjamin Williams Leader letter to Harry Quilter
did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Quilter's review of Leader's work.

did.unittitle: Benjamin Williams Leader letter to J. Manville Form Esq.
did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Concerning Leader's paintings sent to the Academy: Mead and Stream , An Old Country Church , A Hillside Road , Carting Timber.

did.unittitle: Frederic Leighton letter to "Cher Count"

persname.part: Leighton of Stretton, Frederic Leighton, Baron, 1830-1896

did.physdesc: 3 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 20 x 13 cm.

persname.part: Leighton of Stretton, Frederic Leighton, Baron, 1830-1896

did.unittitle: John Le Keux letter to William Bernard Cooke
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 19 x 12 cm.

did.physdesc: 2 pages (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 18 x 11 cm.

scopecontent.p: Concerning a visit to John Linnell on 13 June 1870. Letter is incomplete.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

did.unittitle: Henry William Pickersgill letter to the Chairman and Directors of the East India Company
did.physdesc: 1 page (1 leaf) : autograph letter, signed ; 25 x 20 cm.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Testimonial on behalf of Richard Redgrave's qualifications to fill the position of Drawing Master at Addiscombe, as signed by Pickersgill, Mulready, Eastlake, Briggs, Cooper, Baily, and Etty.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
